quotes.text: Brand awareness is what you measure when you can't measure anything useful.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every marketing metric is a proxy for the one that actually matters: revenue. If you can't tie it to revenue, it's decoration.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: SaaS metrics that matter: retention, retention, retention. Everything else is a vanity metric you report to investors.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every product team says they're 'user-focused.' Then they prioritize internal metrics over user needs.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best SaaS metric is Net Revenue Retention. If it's above 100%, your customers are growing with you. Below 100%, you're leaking.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your SaaS metrics should be on a dashboard that's visible to everyone. Transparency builds trust.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Measuring programming progress by lines of code is like measuring aircraft building progress by weight.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: Revenue is a lagging indicator. Customer satisfaction is a leading indicator. Measure both.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best SaaS businesses have a 'churn rate' that's under 5%. If yours is over 10%, you have a retention problem.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best metrics are actionable. If a metric doesn't tell you what to do next, it's not a metric — it's a number.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every metric has a blind spot. Triangulate. Use at least three metrics to understand reality.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your most important metric is the one that predicts revenue. Everything else is a proxy.
quotes.author: based
